steps.name: TripItemRow home mode: tap toggles needed, green/grey styling
steps.criteria: In home mode, tapping a trip item toggles its needed state (calls onToggleNeeded); needed items show green text, skipped items show grey with strikethrough; Skip button is removed; onEditStaple tap handler removed from home mode
steps.scenario_name: home mode tap toggles needed state with green/grey

steps.name: Home mode long-press opens edit sheet
steps.criteria: In home mode, long-pressing a staple item calls onLongPress with name and area (same as store mode); AreaSection removes skipped items section and Re-add buttons; HomeView wires long-press to edit handler
steps.scenario_name: home mode long-press opens edit and no skip section

steps.name: groupByArea separates one-offs from staples
steps.criteria: groupByArea returns area groups containing only staple items; one-off items are excluded from area groups; a new function or variant returns one-off items separately
steps.scenario_name: groupByArea excludes one-offs from area groups

steps.name: HomeView renders One-offs section in sweep mode
steps.criteria: In sweep mode, one-off items appear in a separate 'One-offs' section below the area sections; the section only renders when one-off items exist on the trip
steps.scenario_name: sweep mode shows one-offs section separately
